# rfranca Global Agent Instructions

> Auto-generated by sync-constitution.ps1 — do NOT edit manually.
> Edit the master at c:\vscode\.specify\memory\constitution.md then re-run the sync script.

## Mandatory: Load and Follow the Constitution

Every AI agent session in this project MUST:

1. Read .specify/memory/constitution.md before taking any action.
2. Apply all rules (P1–P8, O1–O9, C1–C5, S1–S8) without exception.
3. If .specify/memory/constitution.md is unavailable, fall back to the global master at
   c:\vscode\.specify\memory\constitution.md.

## Key Non-Negotiables (inline reminder)

- NEVER fabricate data or credentials (P1, P3).
- NEVER rewrite files — edit surgically (P2, O4).
- ALWAYS warn before destructive actions (P6, O7).
- ALWAYS require human approval before executing (O8).
- NEVER version files by name (-v2, -v3) — use Git (S7).
- NEVER run Connect-AzAccount/MgGraph without explicit confirmation (S4).
